shownotes: Antarctica was dedicated to "all the polar bears in denial" and contained Daily Blues quotes and Ice V and Block of Ice (Osees) teases. Ice V contained Head On/Pill and Blindness (The Fall) teases. Gamma Knife contained Converge teases.  People-Vultures contained Iron Lung teases & quotes and Phantom Island quotes. Stu said "Free Palestine" before Boogieman Sam, which contained an Eternal Return vocal jam, Am I In Heaven? teases and a Riff Raff (AC/DC) tease. Slow Jam 1 contained Am I In Heaven? teases. Am I In Heaven? was unfinished and contained a Sad Pilot jam and Riff Raff (AC/DC) teases. The intro to Self-Immolate contained Am I In Heaven? teases and a drum solo where Stu, Joey, and an audience member shaved most of Stu's head.

Stu said "Free Palestine" before Boogieman Sam, which contained an Eternal Return vocal jam, Am I In Heaven? teases and a Riff Raff (AC/DC) tease. Slow Jam 1 contained Am I In Heaven? teases. Am I In Heaven? was unfinished and contained a Sad Pilot jam and Riff Raff (AC/DC) teases. The intro to Self-Immolate contained Am I In Heaven? teases and a drum solo where Stu, Joey, and an audience member shaved most of Stu's head.

jamchart_notes: An unusually long rendition featuring an extended jam section which contained Daily Blues quotes, Block of Ice (Osees) teases, and a small dash of “evil”.
